category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Minify as Go minifiers for web formats and explains minification for HTML5, CSS3, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML.
source_facts.description lists the same supported formats.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is Minify.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation; source_facts.homepage points to the official Go vanity/import documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tdewolff/minify; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README and source_facts.description list HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, SVG, and XML minification.
